ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the stock prices */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry the company operates in (e.g., Consumer Electronics, Software) */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the company's fiscal year */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's official website */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Company's contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Company's headquarters address */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock after the market closes */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., Bloomberg, Yahoo Finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string or array of specific permissions the user has */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or group the user belongs to within their department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "price_per_share" REAL /* Price per share at the time of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time the trade was executed */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activity_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
